summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS OF EZEKIEL AND SPIRITUAL RENEWAL: Brandon describes a detailed black-and-white vision of Ezekiel standing in a dry valley, blowing a massive shofar. This action causes a river of living water to flow past a large sequoia tree. Brandon observes a peach-like seed covered in blood, representing dormant seeds of the past coming to harvest, and references Genesis 8 to emphasize the acceleration of seedtime and harvest. Additional visions include a baby in a gold-braided white bassinet observed by a faceless man in a veil, a large fox staring at the waterfall, and detached, breathing lungs filled with living water within the falls. Brandon links these visuals to the healing waters described in Ezekiel 47.

WEATHER ANOMALIES AND GLOBAL GEOPOLITICS: Brandon shares foresight regarding extreme weather patterns, including 150 mph winds, weather manipulation, and the emergence of superstorms that will necessitate new categories for tornadoes and hurricanes. On a geopolitical scale, Brandon mentions China loading over 100 nuclear ICBMs into silos and discusses an escalation of conflicts involving Russia, Ukraine, and Israel. Brandon highlights Venezuela's alignment with BRICS nations and Cuba, predicting the current leader will face a downfall similar to Gaddafi or Saddam Hussein. This transition will reportedly involve the sabotage of oil infrastructure and retaliatory threats against American cruise ships in the Caribbean. Furthermore, Brandon outlines a renewed Middle Eastern conflict involving Egypt, Syria, Turkey, and Iran, specifically identifying Cairo and the port of Bulaq as significant locations connected to future military movements.

DOMESTIC THREATS AND INTERNATIONAL SECURITY CONCERNS: Brandon warns of potential terrorist plots and demonic attacks targeting major public gatherings and travel infrastructure. Specific locations mentioned include New York, Las Vegas, New Orleans, Miami, Beverly Hills, the Rose Bowl parade, and Times Square. Brandon emphasizes the threat of commercial drones being weaponized with explosives, urging local law enforcement to utilize jamming technology. Internationally, Brandon points to necessary security measures for the upcoming Winter Olympics in Italy and Christmas Eve midnight mass at the Vatican. Another specific vision entails an attack in France or Italy involving three men in an old white Volkswagen van who use the vehicle and long knives to target crowds.

VISIONS INVOLVING PUBLIC FIGURES AND SPECIFIC REGIONS: Brandon details a vision concerning Mel Gibson and the production of a sequel to the Passion of the Christ movie. The vision includes a fifty million dollar budget and depicts marine-like demonic entities, resembling crawfish with suction cups, attempting to cause writer's block and confusion around the 75 percent completion mark of the film. Regarding regional spiritual activity, Brandon describes a strong demonic principality situated over Seattle, characterized as a muscular, purple figure resembling a nostalgic fast-food mascot wearing boxer trunks. Additionally, Brandon discusses French President Emmanuel Macron, associating him with the historical and spiritual entity Baal-Peor and warning of a rising authoritarian regime.

FINANCIAL BREAKTHROUGHS AND THEOLOGICAL CLARIFICATIONS: Brandon discusses a coming financial shift, mentioning the Dinar, digital frontiers in Iraq, and a vision of a money tree producing hundred-dollar bills. This financial provision is described as a reward meant to prepare individuals for a coming storm and harvest. Brandon also shares a personal testimony regarding a past visitation from Jesus that altered a timeline involving his daughter's medical history and his own life trajectory, emphasizing the power of choices and divine intervention. Lastly, Brandon explicitly dismisses popular theories regarding a three days of darkness event, categorizing them as deceptive and false.
rawData: [December 23, 2025]-[The Lord gave me a vision of Ezekiel Can these bones live]-[https://youtu.be/iOfsrFglC9E]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again tonight. I really appreciate it. I have some things I have to say really quick. We see these things that we talked about last night. Now, last night was very different. Everything the Lord showed us in prayer last night was pretty much over the top. I believe I saw Ezekiel, and he was standing on the side of a mountain, and I saw a valley of desolate dryness. It was black and white; it wasn't in color. It looked like spiritual warfare. And as the valley was black and white, as I was looking into the vision, I could see Ezekiel standing up with a long robe with holes in his gown. It had holes all in it at the bottom where it would drag the rocks, because they didn't have pavement back then. But he had a long shofar in his hands that was a massive horn, and his beard was clear down to the middle of his belly in the vision, and it was gray. His hair was long; his facial hair was very thick and long, like he had been in the wilderness. As he was standing there, I saw light beside him and I could see all these clouds. I heard from a distance with a thunderous voice, "Can these bones live?" And all of a sudden, he took that shofar and he blew it. It was a long blast, and it was very beautiful sounding, but it echoed the presence of God through that valley. The glory of the Lord went through that valley, and water started to come from a massive tree. It didn't come from the tree; it went by the tree, because there are scriptures that back this. I saw the river of this water start to flow the moment he blew the horn, and it started going over this cliff of a beautiful rock. He was standing, then he sat down and took his place of authority by resting at the edge of this rock, and the water came over and he was looking at it. I saw the tree, and it was one of those large sequoia trees, a massive tree that was right by the river of water. As I was looking into this, I saw a piece of fruit that was cut in half. There was a seed in the fruit that looked like a peach pit, covered with blood. It was covered with the blood of Jesus. And the Lord was showing us that all the seeds laid dormant, but they're not dead. The seeds from the past will have a harvest come at last. I saw the manifestation of all the seeds we've sowed, whether they be bad or good; seed time and harvest never ceases. The Lord gave us Genesis 8. I saw seed time and harvest accelerating, and I saw the blessing. The Lord said, "Pray over your past seeds for a crop failure." So we call for a crop failure over our past seeds so that they don't bear any fruit. It was absolutely beautiful what I was seeing, and he gave the scriptures. Then I saw a baby in a bassinet stroller that was braided with gold. It was a white bassinet, and the baby was laying in it with one of those gowns that you use when you take them to get dedicated before the Lord. It was a beautiful white gown that was sparkling with glitter and glowing, and I could see the presence of the Lord on that baby. The feet of the baby were kicking around, excited, like it's cooing and excited about life. I couldn't see the baby, but I could see the feet. Then I saw a man with no face; it looked like a face with a veil over it. I couldn't make it out, but he had the same gown on as the baby did. He was looking over in that baby's bassinet. You couldn't see what he was focused on because there were no eyes, nose, or mouth, but I could see his face was toward the baby. The Lord started talking to us about coming as a child, that we're God's children. Then I saw a fox with a black charcoal nose and eyes. It was a big fox. The small foxes spoil the vines, but as I could see the cliff where the water was coming down, I saw this fox looking up at the water and looking at Ezekiel. It was staring with a gaze, but it didn't do anything. But as I saw this, I saw a pair of lungs inside of that waterfall. The lungs were detached from the body, and they were breathing. The water was filling them up; it was Holy Spirit. You could see the lungs exhale and inhale. It was the living water that was flowing out of those lungs. I could see the veins; I could see the trachea. It was highlighted in a beautiful blue. As I see these visions, the Lord was showing me that scripture from Ezekiel 47. Fruit trees of all kinds will grow on both banks of the river. Their leaves will not wither, nor will their fruit fail. Every month they will bear fruit because the water from the sanctuary flows to them. Their fruit will serve for food and their leaves for healing. I thought it was cool because people found that, and it validates the vision more. You don't want to be flaky. He's trying to get a hold of his body because there's a great shaking. I saw these major events taking place on New Year's Eve, and we are praying for our nation next Wednesday night: New York, Las Vegas, New Orleans, Miami, Nevada, Beverly Hills—every one of these places that would try to have a terrorist attack. We pray for protection and an uncovering of every evil work for every evildoer that would try to cause havoc in this nation. We pray for a supernatural protection over our people that every single plot, every single plan would be uncovered by the blood of Jesus. I believe that we have authority over serpents and scorpions and nothing shall by any means hurt us. And I believe serpents and scorpions in this day and age are terror attacks and demonic attacks from the enemy. I believe we have power to pray over jewelry salesmen and car salesmen and even people working at the bar and believe God for a supernatural protection over them that no weapon formed against them would prosper. God's not showing us this stuff to try to cause drama; He's showing us this so that we can save somebody's life through the power of prayer. It's the same thing when we saw Trump's ear and we saw all about the attack coming on his life. And the Lord warned us in November, way before it happened. And I released that publicly in March; on July the 11th, it manifested. Now, all these things were not to freak out about; it's to intercede and pray and change things just like Trump's life was spared. And I believe that that's the kind of God we serve: that we have power and authority to tread on serpents and all that I just said, but also that He shows us that which is to come so that we can stop it. A lot of the things that we see concerning the weather manifested. The Lord told us there would be around 150 mph winds hitting and there would be weather manipulation and weather warfare in the days ahead with superstorms. And this is what we saw in Wyoming. We prophesied this clear back in 2024 and we saw the manifestation at the end of 2025. And I'm telling you, the Lord said this would become the norm. We'll start seeing superstorms with long-track tornadoes that they'll have to create a new category of tornado in the days ahead as they try to control it. They will lose control. And the Lord showed us it would be great hurricanes that will be on a new category of hurricane. We have category fives right now, and I believe that one day they're going to have to have sixes. You know, maybe you say, "Oh, Brandon, that's absurd." I'm telling you folks, in trying to control the weather, they will lose control. I saw jet streams and things taking place and major events in the water, earthquakes in diverse places. Praying over Italy for the Olympics, praying for no attacks on our Olympic games on February the 6th for the opening ceremony. Praying over all events. Praying for Christmas Eve mass for the Catholic Church at the Vatican, praying over that. This is a very serious thing. We have two days—not tomorrow night but the next night—praying over this time frame, praying over midnight mass for the pope. The Lord showed us a major event taking place at Vatican Square. Praying over that. And so I pray they have extra security for drones. We kept seeing that they would start to use drones—not high-dollar drones from the military, but things you get from Amazon or from Walmart or whatever. You know what I'm talking about? Just an average drone that they attach something to. So, we pray for them to have extra security with those jammers to make them fall out of the sky. That's just the times we're living in, that our local law enforcement all need to have jammers up and ready if there's a major gathering of people. It's just something that would be wise to have, especially for the Rose Bowl parade. We're praying over the Rose Bowl parade. We're praying over New York's Times Square and so on and so on. So we will continue to pray for our president's safety. We pray for Vice President Vance, for all of the family, for Kai, for all the grandkids, for all of them. We pray for a supernatural hedge of protection over our flights concerning holiday travel in the next two days, that there will be no plot or plan or any kind of thing slip through the cracks. And then the Lord said it's not just about America; this is about Europe. We must pray. And I remember how we keep praying over the escalation of war with Putin and Ukraine and then praying over Israel. We see what's going on with Venezuela and what the Lord warned us about Venezuela. How many times has He spoken to us way before all this stuff took place? And I said, when Trump comes on the scene, Venezuela will be a major topic. I have the videos to prove it with all of it. I said, "Venezuela will be a major deal because it's not about the drugs, but it's about oil and it's about the cartels," they say, but this will end up escalating even more. And I saw the BRICS nations reaching out to Venezuela and pulling them in. And the same with Cuba. And my son is trying to make a collage of all the things that the Lord has given us to go with what we're seeing right now to do all the videos in a row. And so it brings credibility. And so you're just always saying, "Well, Brandon, you're just seeing stuff all the time; it's in the news." And I said it way before it was in the news; the Holy Spirit did. This is a very interesting article: "Russia evacuates diplomats' families from Venezuela as US seizes oil tanker." They know what's coming. I said he would be a new Gaddafi. I saw him being a new Gaddafi and that he would be overthrown like a new Saddam, and that they would set all their oil on fire and they would start to set all their oil derricks and all their stuff so that when he's overthrown, they would try to sabotage it for the United States. And the Lord warned us about praying over cruise ships, that they would try as they come through the Caribbean to cause a retaliation for what's about to take place—against cruise ships, Americans on cruise ships. Most people said that would be mass casualty for them if they ever try to attack our cruise ships or whatever. But I'm telling you, desperate people do desperate things. And that's what I saw in retaliation to all this. Now, we're seizing the oil tankers and it's happening just like we saw. I said it has nothing to do with drugs; it has to do with oil. The drugs are 10%; the oil part is 90%. And it's just like the Lord's saying; it's happening. It's happening just like the Lord said. All glory to Jesus for accuracy. And we don't want to be flaky; it's happening. So we pray it de-escalates. We don't want it, but I saw revival breaking out in Venezuela. I saw it breaking out in Brazil. I saw a major wave of revival in Brazil. Revival in Chile. So, that's a good little highlight for y'all. I don't want to be cranky; I want to walk in love, but at the same time, I have to take this very seriously when you're in my position, folks. This is very heavy. And I don't need any nonsense distractions causing drama in my household. I appreciate you understanding. So, let's take communion and pray and see what the Lord has for us tonight. China loads over 100 nuclear ICBMs into silos. That's interesting. Why are they doing that? That's bad. Father, I just thank you for the body. Father, I lift it up before you and I thank you, Father, in the name of Jesus for wisdom. And I thank you, Father, as I grow and I go from glory to glory to the next level, that I use wisdom on how I release things, that I use wisdom on how I pray for things and how I'm able to go about it in public. Father, it's all a learning curve for me. It's like coming underneath a waterfall. But Lord, I thank you that there's peace in the jewelry salesman's heart. I pray for him again that there's peace in his staff, there's peace in the house, there's peace in his marriage and his kids. Father, I thank you that there's no drama. And Father, I thank you for you show us that which is to come. I pray over my eyes tonight. I thank you, Lord, that I see uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I thank you, Father, if there's anything you want me to pray over, we pray in advance over it, and we know that which is to come. And I take this body in the name of Jesus. And I thank you, Lord, that you rebuke the devourer for our sake. I thank you, Father, for this platform that you've given me. And I thank you, Lord, that you protect us, you guide us, you strengthen us, and you give us wisdom like Solomon to lead the people. I thank you, Father, for your hand on our homes. I thank you, Lord, that they're healed and whole and well in their bodies. Father, that they go into this beautiful Christmas season the next two days, that they'll have the greatest sense of joy, the greatest sense of peace, and the greatest sense of love in their household with no strife. Father, their marriages will be the best they've ever been. We call forth great marriages. We call forth great peace in their homes in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Lord, that healing and wholeness and wellness belongs to us in the name of Jesus. And we take this body in Jesus' name. And we thank you, Lord, for it. Lord, we thank you for the blood. We make much of the blood. The blood makes much of us. We apply the blood of Jesus over us. We apply the blood of Jesus over our houses. We make much of the blood. We thank you, Lord, for your blood that made us strong. You are the one that washed us and made us clean. Father, I thank you, Lord, in the name of Jesus for all that you've done and all that you continue to do in the name of Jesus. And we give you praise and glory for it. Amen and amen. In your opinion, was that good? I didn't mean to butcher it. I probably should have done that, not on live, honey. I'm doing the best I can. All right. Oh, Father, help me. Get me in the right mood. It's just real, you know. When you deal with flesh, it's such a distraction. One day we'll have glorified bodies and we won't have to deal with all this. It's so amazing that there'll be a day when we are in paradise forever with Jesus. Oh, what a day of rejoicing that will be. What a day. What a day of rejoicing that will be when we all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory. When we all get to heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be when we all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory. When we all get to heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be when we all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory. When we all get to heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be. When we all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory. Thank you, Father. Thank you Lord. Thank you Father for the blood. Jesus is coming soon, morning or night or noon. Many will meet their doom; trumpets will surely sound. All of the dead shall rise, righteous meet in the sky, going where no one dies; heavenward bound. Thank you, Lord. And Jesus is coming soon, morning or night or noon. Many will meet their doom; trumpets will surely sound. All of the dead shall rise, righteous meet in the sky, going where no one dies; heavenward bound. Thank you, Father. Thank you, Father. What can wash away my sin? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. What can make me whole again? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. Oh, precious is the flow that makes me white as snow; no other fount I know, nothing but the blood of Jesus. Thank you, Father. Oh, what a precious blood you flow. I thought about telling you all about what happened to me whenever I was always upset. I know there's a lot of you that have heard this, but there's some that have not. So, I will tell you about the time when Jesus visited me. This was a visitation; it was real. It wasn't a dream. This wasn't a vision. He actually came to my house. And there's some of you who say, 'I don't believe it at all.' But that's fine. I'll tell you what happened. I was in bed and all of a sudden I felt a hand touch me and he woke me up out of my sleep. Before my bed I was laying there on this side right here. I was laying like this and he touched this side of my shoulder and he touched me and I woke up and I looked up and Jesus was standing there and he said, 'I've come to give you your request. I want to show you something.' And all of a sudden the floor began to glow. It opened up in a portal before me and I was taken back at this so much as you are in the natural like flesh and I'm seeing all this and my floor is breathing. It started to open up in this portal and it was turning and it was breathing and it was accelerating. It was exhaling, inhaling, and it was moving all around my floor. And he said, 'Put your feet over here.' And he goes, 'Jump.' So I took my feet and I said, 'You want me to jump?' He said, 'Trust me, Brandon.' I said, 'Of course, Lord.' I took my feet and I fell inside of that portal. It was moving and breathing and I was instantaneously taken to my past. And I went to the hospital where my little girl got her shots. And he said, 'Brandon, you've asked me and asked me to have the opportunity in your heart to have a second chance to tell yourself not to give Megan the flu shot. I'm going to give you that request.' And all of a sudden he said, 'Go now. You're about to do it.' I ran and I could see the hospital room. I knew it was on the fourth floor. I ran all the way up the stairs. I busted through the doctor's office and I saw the nurse about ready to give Megan the vaccination. And at me as a young man and my wife was sitting there and we were watching our daughter about to get this flu shot, I said, 'Stop. Don't do it.' And all of a sudden, that nurse took that thing back and did not administer that and a scream came before my face. And every single year was planned out in front of me from where I was to the present. And now this has been years ago. And this is just out of my memory of everything that happened. So if I miss anything, forgive me. But I remember I saw it play out and Jesus stood right there and he said, 'Now I want to show you the power of a decision. Watch what happens now with your life because of that vaccination or what would change.' Megan was already developed. She was already starting to talk. She was totally normal. Her Apgar scores were completely normal. But as that did not happen, I was a bad person. I was very angry. I was very verbally abusive to my wife all the time. I talked down to her. I didn't treat her right. I was very hard-hearted. I was very angry at the finances. Where we were financially, I was very bitter towards a lot of things. But the moment Megan didn't get that and change didn't happen, I saw my life without the pressure of autism is what I'm trying to tell y'all. Megan developed normally. Everything was normal. But I didn't change. I became even more hard. And Diana and I drifted apart. I saw the year that Diana left me and she moved back home to Texas to be with her mama and she filed for a divorce. I saw it all play right in front of my face in a movie screen of all the power of a choice because what didn't change me was my daughter's special needs. I saw it all pan out in front of me. I saw when Diana left; she got remarried to a man that was pretty wealthy. I saw Megan on the weekends every other week. I became even more angry. Her life was better. Mine wasn't. I didn't get remarried. I was very angry—heavier than what I am now. He said, "I want to show you now: your son won't be born and there's a call on his life, and here in the future you'll have a little girl. You'll have a little girl, and she won't be born either, and she has a major call in her life too." He said, "Brandon..." He started preaching to me and he started talking to me about everything—to sum it up and not make this really long for y'all tonight because I'm already going over. But he said, "Brandon, I didn't cause Megan to have autism. I did not do this to you to teach you anything." He said to me, "The devil comes to kill, steal, and destroy. But what the devil meant for bad, I'll turn it around for good in your favor. You're not big enough to mess up your life. You're not big enough to mess up your life, Brandon. No matter how many bad choices you've made, he said, 'As long as the footsteps of the righteous are ordered of the Lord. And as long as you're right with me and you're seeking me, I'll turn it around. I'll turn what the devil meant for bad, Brandon, and I'll turn it around for good in your favor as long as you're looking towards me.'" Because in my mind, I always told him, "I can't do ministry. I can't lay hands on the sick. I can't do all that because of Megan, Lord. What do you call me to healing ministry? Well, you called me to do all these things. I'm broken because of this." But he said, "Brandon, Megan does not validate my word. My word validates itself. It's a pillar. Megan's healing doesn't validate that I'm a healer. My word validates that." As he said all these things to me, I saw the pressure from having a child with special needs. As I was ready to drive off a bridge, as I was ready to do away with myself so many different times, as I was driving home and crying behind the toilets, cleaning the church bathrooms, and doing all the things that I went through being a janitor for 15 years—it molded me. It took a really hard heart and made it soft as I had to buckle up and honor my wife and go through this very hard time raising a child with special needs. The pressure on the potter's wheel makes you different if you yield to it. It's the pressure. We have this treasure in earthen vessels that the excellency of the power will be known to him and not of us. But the pressure from Megan and all the things that I went through made me into who I am today. As he kept telling me that I couldn't mess my life up no matter how bad I've done things in the past, he said, "I told you if the footsteps of the righteous are ordered of the Lord." He encouraged me. He preached to me. He preached a really fiery message that I wish I could remember all of it. I've never heard Jesus as a preacher. And boy, he could preach fire. I'll never forget it. I sat there and watched him as he preached to me, and he told me that I had a call on my life and he wanted me to do something for him. I thought at that moment that I had totally derailed my life because of what the doctor had told us: that Megan would never be normal and that she would never be potty trained. She would never have a normal life, and we'd be lucky if she ever gets out of an 18-month-old's stage. But that's why I've tried to tell you all over and over again. Right now, we weren't able to do anything. If anybody realized how bad Megan was—she would urinate on everything. She would play with her feces every day. She would bite herself until blood would run down her hands, pull her hair out. She had huge bald spots all over her head where she'd pull all her hair out, take everything out of one drawer in one room and put it in there. I never knew where my toothbrush was. I never knew where my deodorant was. I never knew where my soap from my bathroom was. She'd take all the ornaments off the tree every single year and put them in the kitchen sink. We never could have a Christmas tree. We never could do anything. We did that for years. And then one day Jesus visited us. And in that time whenever he visited, I was at the sink and I was complaining, and I said to him, "You don't hear anything I'm saying? I prayed and prayed and prayed for her to get better." And I said, "She's not. Do you hear, and have you heard, any of my prayers?" I was washing the dishes. And at that time, the glory of the Lord filled my whole house. And I saw him visibly again. I was on the floor and Diana couldn't see him. I was on the floor and he melted me like wax. I thought I was going to die. The presence of the Lord was so strong in my house; I thought I was going to die. I looked up at him and I said, "Jesus, don't you know what I've asked for?" Because he asked me, the first thing he asked me was, "What do you have need of?" I said, "Don't you know what I have need of? Megan!" He said, "According to your faith, be it done unto you, Brandon. According to your faith, be it done unto you." Diana came around the corner at this time and she saw me on the floor and she felt the presence of the Lord so strong in the house and she thought I was dying. She started screaming. She says, "Jesus, don't take him. Don't take him. I need my husband. I can't do this on my own." She goes, "Is he dying? Are you dying?" And she started yelling. I said, "Jesus is here, honey." She says, "I know, I can feel it, but I can't see him." And I started crying out and he ministered to me and he put his hand on my head and he blessed me. He said, "She'll start to amend from this hour." And I knew it's going to be gradual like I've always told y'all; a miracle is a miracle even if it's not overnight. A miracle is a miracle even if it's progressive. I saw everything from that day forward—that I knew it was going to be a journey. But Jesus told me, "According to your faith, be it done unto you." When I woke up the next day, I went over and told my grandfather because we lived across the street at the time. I said, "Grandpa, we had a visitation from Jesus." Megan didn't act any different. I thought, "Surely if Jesus shows up in your house, Megan's going to be completely healed and it's going to be a sign and a wonder." Time goes by. This is a Friday, Saturday, Sunday, Monday—she goes to her little ABA therapy lady and she calls and she said, "Brandon, what happened to Megan?" I said, "Kimberly, what are you talking about? What happened to Megan?" She said, "Something's happened to Megan." I said, "What? What? Does she have a bruise? What is it?" Because you're thinking, "What are you accusing me of?" But it wasn't. She said, "She's saying little sentences. She's parroting something for the first time. Something's happened." She was saying red; she says blue. She says all these different colors that she was parroting from that day forward. And Megan still does those things. She even told me today, "Hi, daddy, mommy." She was talking to both of us. But from that time forward, it's been a step all the time and we keep seeing a little bit more. But then, even my family, nobody could even touch her hardly. She acted like she was a wild animal. It was absolutely hell on earth. But from that time forward when Jesus visited, she's gotten better and better. And it hasn't been instantaneous, like everything's better. Like the one with the issue of blood, I'm believing that moment's coming. But what I'm trying to tell you is that sometimes it's progressive. Now, between that and all that I've told you of two visitations tonight and just that short little bit of time, I cut them up in pieces to make that really quick for you. What I'm trying to tell you is I want you to believe God for it. No matter how bad you think you've disrupted your life and you think that you can't be used by God, and no matter how hard you think you've had it, the footsteps of the righteous are ordered by the Lord, and you're not big enough to derail your life. You can say, 'Well, Brandon, I was a prostitute. I was on drugs. I was in jail. I went and I did, I robbed banks.' Or maybe you're a wife beater. Maybe you were all these different things and your wife left you or whatever. But what I'm trying to tell you is that no matter how bad you think you are, no matter how bad you've disrupted your life, if you're seeking God, no matter how bad you've messed up, God will turn it on a dime. Never give up on what your dreams are. Never give up on what you're believing for. Always stay close to the vine. Regardless of how hard you think your life is, it's the pressure that changes you. You may have been a janitor. You may have been a store clerk. You may be somebody that was a gas attendant. It doesn't matter. Whatever you do, in word and in deed, do all to the glory of God.
